title: Wulfhunter's Civilizations
description: Create a Civilization, explore, automate, fight bosses, and rule your world.
body:
With over 200 mods, rule your own world with magic, technology, and maybe even darkness. Use Minecolonies to create a colony of your liking, massive spraling cities or small quaint villages. Automate resources using Create, Ars Neuveau, and Occultism. Become a mage via Iron's Spells and Spellbooks and Ars Nouveau. Cook extravagant meals and gain benefits from Farmers delight. Anything you can imagine is yours in this pack.



Includes mods from both Modrinth and CurseForge.
